2605.18721.title: General Preference Reinforcement Learning
2605.18721.paper_summary: Post-training has split large language model (LLM) alignment into two largely disconnected tracks. Online reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards drives emergent reasoning on math and code but depends on a programmatic verifier that cannot reach open-ended tasks, while preference optimization handles open-ended generation yet forgoes the continuous exploration that powers online RL. Closing this gap requires a verifier for open-ended quality, but a scalar reward model is the wrong shape for the job. Quality is multi-dimensional, and any scalar score is an incomplete proxy that lets online RL collapse onto whichever axis the score is most sensitive to. We turn instead to the General Preference Model (GPM), which embeds responses into $k$ skew-symmetric subspaces and represents preference as a structured, intransitivity-aware comparison. Building on this, we propose General Preference Reinforcement Learning (GPRL), which carries the $k$-way structure through to the policy update. GPRL computes per-dimension group-relative advantages, normalizes each on its own scale so no axis can dominate, and aggregates them with context-dependent eigenvalues. The same structure powers a closed-loop drift monitor that detects single-axis exploitation and corrects it on the fly by reweighting dimensions and tightening the trust region. Starting from $\texttt{Llama-3-8B-Instruct}$, GPRL reaches a length-controlled win rate of $56.51\%$ on AlpacaEval~2.0 while also outperforming SimPO and SPPO on Arena-Hard, MT-Bench, and WildBench by resisting reward hacking across extended training runs.
2605.18721.paper_summary_zh: 後訓練將大型語言模型（LLM）的對齊分為兩個基本上不相連的路徑。<lb/> 在線強化學習（RL）利用可驗證的獎勵驅動數學和代碼的突現推理，但依賴於一個無法處理開放式任務的程式驗證器，而偏好優化則處理開放式生成，但放棄了推動在線RL的持續探索。<lb/> 彌補這一差距需要一個用於開放式質量的驗證器，但標量獎勵模型的形狀不適合這項工作。<lb/> 質量是多維的，任何標量分數都是不完整的代理，讓在線RL崩潰到該分數最敏感的任一軸上。<lb/> 我們轉而使用一般偏好模型（GPM），該模型將反應嵌入到 $k$ 個斜對稱子空間中，並將偏好表示為結構化的、考慮不傳遞性的比較。<lb/> 在此基礎上，我們提出了一般偏好強化學習（GPRL），該方法將 $k$ 維結構延續到政策更新中。<lb/> GPRL 計算每個維度的群體相對優勢，並在其自身的尺度上對每個維度進行標準化，以確保沒有一個軸可以主導，並使用依賴於上下文的特徵值進行聚合。<lb/> 相同的結構驅動一個閉環漂移監測器，該監測器檢測單軸利用並通過重新加權維度和收緊信任區域即時修正它。<lb/> 從 $\texttt{Llama-3-8B-Instruct}$ 開始，GPRL 在 AlpacaEval~2.0 上達到了長度控制的勝率 $56.51\%$，同時在 Arena-Hard、MT-Bench 和 WildBench 上也超越了 SimPO 和 SPPO，通過抵抗在延長訓練過程中的獎勵黑客行為。
2605.18721.author: Muhammad Umer et.al.
2605.18721.authors: Muhammad Umer, Muhammad Ahmed Mohsin, Ahsan Bilal, Arslan Chaudhry, Andreas Haupt, Sanmi Koyejo, Emily Fox, John M. Cioffi
